name: github_create_org_copilot_space_resource
description: Create a resource for an organization Copilot Space (POST /orgs/{org}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}/resources). Requires resource_type and metadata. Returns HTTP 201 or 200 for duplicate github_file. See [Create a resource for an organization Copilot Space](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-sp
